items.name: Lanterns Through Reedfall
items.description: Lyra Emberwell turns a frontier defense into an advance through the Reedfall marsh, carrying each victory forward into the next chapter.
items.summary: A three-chapter frontier war campaign about turning a border defense into a full marsh push.
items.arc_goal: Break the Reedfall raider road, seize the marsh causeway, and shatter the Fen Crown command post before Mireclaw regains the frontier initiative.
items.completion_summary: Lyra's drive through River Pass, Blackfen Gate, and the crown isle turns Reedfall from a bleeding border into an Embercourt-held marsh corridor.

scenarios.label: Chapter I: River Pass
scenarios.description: Hold Riverwatch, purge the raiders, and seize Duskfen Bastion before the Mireclaw warhost breaks the pass.
scenarios.status_hint: Establish the League foothold and open the road into Reedfall.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Exports Lyra's hero growth, spellbook, relics, and half the recovered stores into the marsh push.
scenarios.briefing: Mireclaw raiders have cracked the border screen. Hold Riverwatch long enough to clear the pass and turn the frontier forts into a launch line.
scenarios.intel: Duskfen Bastion and the marsh approaches are contested by fast raider packs; if they keep the pass open, Lyra loses the road before reinforcements arrive.
scenarios.stakes: Secure Riverwatch, purge the raiders, and seize Duskfen so Embercourt can advance into Reedfall instead of fighting on the border.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: Riverwatch stands, the pass is open, and Lyra can carry men and stores into the marsh for the next push.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: The pass falls back into chaos, Lyra's line breaks, and Reedfall remains a raider road.
scenarios.journal_victory: Lyra held Riverwatch, broke the pass, and opened the first hard road into Reedfall.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Lyra failed to lock the pass, and the marsh war stayed on Embercourt's doorstep.

scenarios.label: Chapter II: Causeway Stand
scenarios.description: Push from captured Duskfen into the marsh causeway and take Blackfen Gate with whatever Lyra carried out of River Pass.
scenarios.status_hint: Convert the first victory into a durable marsh staging ground.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports River Pass carryover and banks a second bundle for the final campaign break.
scenarios.briefing: Lyra must turn the first victory into a real foothold by driving along the flooded causeway before Mireclaw rebuilds Blackfen Gate.
scenarios.intel: The covenant is retreating in order, with marshals buying time around the gate while surviving raiders harry the road behind your bridgehead.
scenarios.stakes: If Blackfen Gate holds, River Pass becomes another isolated win; if it falls, Embercourt gains a durable staging ground in the marsh.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: Blackfen Gate is broken and the causeway is yours, giving Reedfall a stable staging ground for the crown-isle strike.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: The causeway stalls under counterattack and Lyra's bridgehead starts to shrink back toward Duskfen.
scenarios.journal_victory: Lyra turned Duskfen into a marsh bridgehead and shattered the gate marshals at Blackfen.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Lyra was checked on the causeway, and the marsh gate stayed in Mireclaw hands.

scenarios.label: Chapter III: Fen Crown
scenarios.description: Use the captured gate as a bridgehead, drive on the covenant's crown isle, and break the marsh command post before Mireclaw reforms.
scenarios.status_hint: Spend the full campaign carryover to finish the Reedfall offensive.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports the Causeway Stand bundle and resolves the campaign finale.
scenarios.briefing: With Blackfen taken, Lyra must spend every recovered advantage to strike the covenant crown isle before the marsh command can reform.
scenarios.intel: Fen Crown is ringed by veteran defenders and whatever escaped the gate fight; delay gives Mireclaw time to re-knit the isle into a new command post.
scenarios.stakes: Take the crown isle now and the Reedfall offensive is won; fail and Mireclaw regains the initiative across the whole frontier.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: Fen Crown falls, the marsh command post is broken, and Reedfall is secured under Embercourt pressure.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: The crown isle holds, buying Mireclaw the time it needs to rebuild the Reedfall warhost.
scenarios.journal_victory: Lyra broke the crown isle and finished the Reedfall offensive in one sustained drive.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Lyra failed at Fen Crown, and the marsh command survived long enough to rally.

items.name: Warden of Stonewake
items.description: Caelen Ashgrove fights across mill roads, ferry booms, and shrine causeways to keep the Stonewake Basin from falling to the Mireclaw inland host.
items.summary: A three-chapter inland counteroffensive about holding mill country, cutting ferry lanes, and storming a marsh redoubt.
items.arc_goal: Hold the basin rim, cut the ferry chain, and break Nightglass before the inland host can turn Stonewake's crossings into a permanent warfront.
items.completion_summary: Caelen's basin counteroffensive survives the mill roads, ferry levees, and shrine causeway, leaving Nightglass broken and the inland crossings in charter hands.

scenarios.label: Chapter I: Stonewake Watch
scenarios.description: Hold Highwater Keep, secure Willow Mill, and seize Murkward Ford before the inland host cuts the basin open.
scenarios.status_hint: Turn a mill-country defense into a river crossing.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Exports Caelen's hero growth, spellbook, relics, and half the reclaimed stores into the ferry advance.
scenarios.briefing: Caelen must hold the basin rim, keep Highwater supplied, and seize Murkward Ford before the inland host splits Stonewake apart.
scenarios.intel: Mireclaw pressure is coming through the mills and along the ford; if the beacons stay dark, the ferry front cannot be opened.
scenarios.stakes: Save the basin rim and light the ford for a counteroffensive, or lose Stonewake's river crossings before the campaign begins.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: The basin rim holds, Murkward Ford is lit, and Caelen can launch across the water instead of waiting behind the mills.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: Stonewake's rim cracks, the beacons fail, and the basin is left reacting instead of counterattacking.
scenarios.journal_victory: Caelen held Highwater's rim, secured the mills, and lit Murkward Ford for the next crossing.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Caelen lost the basin tempo at Stonewake, and the ford stayed dark.

scenarios.label: Chapter II: Reedbarrow Ferry
scenarios.description: Launch from captured Murkward Ford, clear the barrow levees, and take Reedbarrow Ferry before the covenant isolates the crossing.
scenarios.status_hint: Use the captured ford to open a sustained inland advance.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports Stonewake Watch carryover and banks a second bundle for the final inland assault.
scenarios.briefing: With the ford secured, Caelen must clear the levees and cut Reedbarrow Ferry before Mireclaw isolates the inland crossing.
scenarios.intel: Barrow pickets and ferry crews are trying to hold the chain long enough for Nightglass to brace the far bank.
scenarios.stakes: If the ferry chain is cut, Stonewake gains a real inland road; if it holds, the basin offensive chokes at the waterline.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: Reedbarrow Ferry is cut loose from Mireclaw control and Caelen has the bridgehead needed for the Nightglass assault.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: The levees hold just long enough for the covenant to keep the ferry choke closed.
scenarios.journal_victory: Caelen cut the Reedbarrow ferry chain and opened the inland route to Nightglass.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Caelen failed to break Reedbarrow's chain, and the crossing stayed contested.

scenarios.label: Chapter III: Nightglass Redoubt
scenarios.description: Use Reedbarrow Ferry as a bridgehead, clear the mirror causeway, and break the Nightglass shrine-redoubt before the basin host regroups.
scenarios.status_hint: Spend the full inland carryover to finish the Stonewake campaign.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports the Reedbarrow Ferry bundle and resolves the Stonewake finale.
scenarios.briefing: Caelen's inland bridgehead is in place; now he must clear the mirror causeway and break the Nightglass redoubt before the basin host regroups.
scenarios.intel: Nightglass is protected by shrine wards, reserve marsh fighters, and anything that escaped Reedbarrow intact.
scenarios.stakes: Destroy the redoubt now and Stonewake survives the inland war; fail and Nightglass becomes the basin's rally point.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: Nightglass is broken, its shrine-redoubt silenced, and Stonewake's inland host is scattered.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: Nightglass holds the causeway and Mireclaw keeps a hardened redoubt on the basin flank.
scenarios.journal_victory: Caelen smashed Nightglass and ended the inland campaign before the basin line could break again.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Caelen was turned back at Nightglass, leaving the redoubt to anchor another marsh surge.

items.name: Bogbound Oath
items.description: Vaska Reedmaw drags Mireclaw out of Duskfen, cuts the charter roads apart, and drives all the way to Highwater Keep before Embercourt can reform the basin line.
items.summary: A three-chapter Mireclaw counteroffensive about seizing roads, breaking granary levies, and drowning the charter marches.
items.arc_goal: Seize Riverwatch, burn the charter road, and drown Highwater before Embercourt can re-form the basin marches.
items.completion_summary: Vaska converts a Duskfen defense into a clean marsh surge, breaking Highwater and leaving the charter marches open to Mireclaw control.

scenarios.label: Chapter I: Bogbound Oath
scenarios.description: Hold Duskfen, break the lantern scouts and survey train, and seize Riverwatch Hold before Embercourt relief seals the road.
scenarios.status_hint: Turn a marsh defense into a clean road capture.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Exports Vaska's hero growth, spellbook, relics, and half the seized road stores into the basin push.
scenarios.briefing: Vaska must turn Duskfen's defense into a counterstroke by seizing Riverwatch before Embercourt seals the road with fresh levies.
scenarios.intel: Lantern scouts and a survey train are trying to map the channels for a clean charter advance; break them and the road fight turns.
scenarios.stakes: Take Riverwatch and Mireclaw gains the road war; fail and Embercourt keeps the marsh pinned behind its own border.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: Riverwatch falls, the channels are marked for Mireclaw use, and Vaska can drive straight into the charter belt.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: Riverwatch holds long enough for Embercourt to keep the road war on Mireclaw's side of the frontier.
scenarios.journal_victory: Vaska broke the lantern screen, seized Riverwatch, and opened the charter road to Mireclaw.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Vaska failed to take Riverwatch, and Embercourt kept the road war contained.

scenarios.label: Chapter II: Charter Pyre
scenarios.description: Advance from captured Riverwatch, hold Murkward as a flank stockade, and break Highwater's granary line before the basin roads stabilize.
scenarios.status_hint: Exploit the first breach before Embercourt can retie its road network.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports Bogbound Oath carryover and banks a final road-breaking bundle for the Highwater assault.
scenarios.briefing: With Riverwatch taken, Vaska must burn through the granary line and hold Murkward as a flank stockade before Highwater stabilizes.
scenarios.intel: Granary levies and beacon wardens are delaying hard, trying to preserve a serviceable road for Highwater's relief columns.
scenarios.stakes: Break the charter road now and Highwater can be assaulted on open terms; fail and Embercourt reties the basin line.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: The granary line burns, the charter road opens, and Vaska banks a clean route into Highwater.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: The road belt survives long enough for Embercourt to patch its crossings and deny the final surge.
scenarios.journal_victory: Vaska burned the charter road and turned the basin approach into Mireclaw ground.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Vaska stalled at the charter road, and Embercourt kept its basin lifeline intact.

scenarios.label: Chapter III: Lockmarsh Surge
scenarios.description: Launch from the broken charter belt, cut the road chaplains, and storm Highwater Keep before Embercourt can rebuild the basin line.
scenarios.status_hint: Spend the full road-war carryover to finish the Mireclaw campaign.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports the Charter Pyre bundle and resolves the Mireclaw counteroffensive.
scenarios.briefing: The road belt is broken. Vaska must hit Highwater before the charter hosts rebuild their discipline around the keep.
scenarios.intel: Road chaplains and bastion reserves are the last organized wall between Mireclaw and a drowned basin capital.
scenarios.stakes: Storm Highwater now and Embercourt loses the marches; fail and the keep becomes the spine of a renewed charter defense.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: Highwater breaks under the surge, leaving the charter marches shattered and Mireclaw ascendant.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: Highwater survives the assault, giving Embercourt the time and prestige to rebuild the marches.
scenarios.journal_victory: Vaska drowned Highwater's line and finished the Mireclaw counteroffensive at the basin heart.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Vaska failed to break Highwater, and the charter keep held the marches together.

items.name: Shards of Daybreak
items.description: Solera Prismarch rallies the Sunvault Compact from Prismhearth, relights Halo Spire, and forces a road through both charter wardens and marsh raiders before the relay network goes dark.
items.summary: A three-chapter Sunvault campaign about reclaiming relay towers, breaking the charter road line, and turning a prepared array into a decisive frontier offensive.
items.arc_goal: Relight the relay chain, sever the glassroad, and reclaim the daybreak array before Nightglass can black out Glassfen again.
items.completion_summary: Solera turns Prismhearth's survival into a full Compact offensive, reclaiming the array and securing Glassfen's relay frontier by force.

scenarios.label: Chapter I: Prismhearth Watch
scenarios.description: Hold Prismhearth, reclaim Halo Spire, and break the saboteur bands before Mireclaw drowns the relay chain.
scenarios.status_hint: Turn a shrinking ward line into a real Compact bridgehead.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Exports Solera's hero growth, spellbook, relics, and half the recovered relay stores into the charter-road push.
scenarios.briefing: Solera must keep Prismhearth alive, reclaim Halo Spire, and relight the relay chain before the Compact loses the whole frontier network.
scenarios.intel: Saboteur bands are cutting relay sites one by one; if Halo stays dark, the charter road and the marsh raids will isolate Prismhearth.
scenarios.stakes: Relight the relay and Sunvault gains a true bridgehead; fail and the Compact fights blind across Glassfen.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: Halo Spire is relit, the relay line holds, and Solera can turn defense into an offensive push.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: The relay chain stays fractured, leaving Prismhearth exposed and the frontier network half-blind.
scenarios.journal_victory: Solera relit Halo Spire and restored the first working relay line of the campaign.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Solera failed to relight the frontier, and Prismhearth remained isolated.

scenarios.label: Chapter II: Glassroad Sundering
scenarios.description: Push out of reclaimed Halo Spire, tear open the charter road, and seize Riverwatch before Embercourt can stabilize the market crossings.
scenarios.status_hint: Convert the reclaimed relay into a sustained Sunvault offensive.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports Prismhearth Watch carryover and banks a final bundle for the Nightglass push.
scenarios.briefing: With Halo active again, Solera must break the charter road crossings and seize Riverwatch before Embercourt and Mireclaw can close ranks.
scenarios.intel: Archive wardens and bridge levies are trying to hold a market-road lattice together long enough to absorb the Sunvault push.
scenarios.stakes: Shatter the glassroad and the Compact gains a sustained offensive lane; fail and the reclaimed relay becomes an isolated outpost again.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: The charter road is sundered, Riverwatch is seized, and Sunvault carries the war onto the enemy crossings.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: The road lattice holds and Solera's new bridgehead risks collapsing back toward Halo Spire.
scenarios.journal_victory: Solera broke the glassroad crossings and pushed the Compact out of relay-defense posture.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Solera could not break the road lattice, and the offensive stalled short of Riverwatch.

scenarios.label: Chapter III: Daybreak Spire
scenarios.description: Launch from the broken road line, seize the old daybreak array, and shatter Nightglass before Mireclaw can drown the Compact in a second time.
scenarios.status_hint: Spend the full Compact carryover to finish the Glassfen campaign.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports the Glassroad Sundering bundle and resolves the Sunvault campaign finale.
scenarios.briefing: Solera now has a live road into Nightglass. She must seize the old daybreak array and finish the marsh redoubt before the frontier goes dark again.
scenarios.intel: Nightglass still has surviving marsh veterans and reserve batteries guarding the array approaches; a failed strike will hand them the initiative back.
scenarios.stakes: Take the array and break Nightglass now, or the Compact loses its best chance to turn the relay network into a decisive war-winning front.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: The daybreak array is reclaimed, Nightglass is shattered, and the Compact secures Glassfen by force of arms.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: The array remains contested and Nightglass survives to threaten the relay line anew.
scenarios.journal_victory: Solera reclaimed the daybreak array and finished the Compact campaign with a decisive Nightglass victory.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Solera failed at Daybreak Spire, leaving Nightglass alive to contest the relays again.

items.name: Ninefold Survey Docket
items.description: Mira Flintmere and Caelen Ashgrove turn two compact Embercourt fronts into a surveyed road toward the Ninefold Confluence, carrying recorded victories into the current broad authored map.
items.summary: A three-chapter authored campaign docket that links existing skirmish maps into campaign selection, carryover, completion, and replay flow.
items.arc_goal: Secure the ironbridge line, break the Glassfen relay screen, and then chart the full confluence without treating the breadth map as broad completion.
items.completion_summary: The ironbridge, Glassfen, and confluence records form a replayable Embercourt survey docket while keeping this as a narrow breadth increment.

scenarios.label: Chapter I: Ironbridge Stand
scenarios.description: Turn Highwater's bridgehead into a clean advance, retake Murkward Ford, and keep the marsh raiders off the road.
scenarios.status_hint: Open the survey road by securing the ford and breaking the first Mireclaw raider screen.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Exports Mira's hero growth, spellbook, relics, half the recovered stores, and bridgehead flags into the Glassfen push.
scenarios.briefing: Mira Flintmere must turn the bridgehead into a stable road before the survey writ can move east.
scenarios.intel: Ford reavers and silt hunters are using Murkward as a raider gate; if they keep the ford loose, no survey column reaches the Glassfen intact.
scenarios.stakes: Claim Murkward and the column gains a road; fail and Highwater remains pinned behind the bridge.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: The ironbridge line holds, the ford is reclaimed, and the survey column can advance toward the relay fields.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: Murkward remains a raider gate and the survey road collapses back to Highwater.
scenarios.journal_victory: Mira held the ironbridge line and opened the first leg of the survey road.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Mira failed to secure the ironbridge road.

scenarios.label: Chapter II: Glassfen Breakers
scenarios.description: Break the Sunvault relay screens, seize Prismhearth, and keep the survey road from becoming a battery line.
scenarios.status_hint: Convert the ironbridge win into a relay-field advance.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports the Ironbridge bundle and exports Caelen's Glassfen record for the confluence survey.
scenarios.briefing: Caelen Ashgrove advances through the Glassfen with the bridgehead stores behind him and Prismhearth ahead.
scenarios.intel: Relay pickets and the Aurora Battery are synchronizing the field; a slow push lets Sunvault turn every road into prepared fire.
scenarios.stakes: Break Prismhearth and the confluence road opens; fail and the survey writ dies under the relay arrays.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: The Glassfen relay line breaks and the final confluence survey can assemble from a recorded road.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: Prismhearth holds, severing the survey road before it reaches the confluence.
scenarios.journal_victory: Caelen broke the Glassfen arrays and carried the road toward the confluence.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Caelen failed to break the Glassfen front.

scenarios.label: Chapter III: Ninefold Confluence
scenarios.description: Chart the full confluence, break the Basalt Gatehouse custodians, and force the five rival frontier towns into the Embercourt survey compact.
scenarios.status_hint: Use this authored breadth map as a campaign-recorded survey and replay target, not as a broad completion claim.
scenarios.carryover_summary: Imports the Glassfen bundle and resolves the survey docket finale.
scenarios.briefing: Mira Flintmere has one survey writ and too many claimants. Establish the central camp, read the faction fronts, and decide which rival town falls first.
scenarios.intel: Mireclaw drums, Sunvault relays, Thornwake graft roads, Brasshollow contract routes, and Veilmourn fog harbors are all active around the survey line.
scenarios.stakes: A completed survey gives Embercourt a recorded route through the confluence; failure leaves the map split into rival claims.
scenarios.aftermath_victory: The confluence is charted under Embercourt seal and the campaign docket can be replayed from the recorded chapter.
scenarios.aftermath_defeat: The survey camp fails to hold the center and the rival claims remain unresolved.
scenarios.journal_victory: Mira charted the Ninefold Confluence and forced every rival town into the survey compact.
scenarios.journal_defeat: Mira failed to hold the confluence survey line.
